# Security

## Supported versions

Security updates are applied to the latest minor release line. Check [releases](https://github.com/made-for-me/stage/releases) for current tags.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please **do not** file public GitHub issues for security problems.

Use **[GitHub private security advisories](https://github.com/made-for-me/stage/security/advisories/new)** for this repository when available, or contact the Made for Me org maintainers through the org’s published security channel.

Include:

- Description of the issue and impact
- Steps to reproduce or a proof of concept
- Affected versions or commits, if known

We aim to acknowledge reports within a few business days and coordinate disclosure after a fix is available.

## Coordinated disclosure

We appreciate responsible reporting and will credit researchers who wish to be named after remediation.
